FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Win32TextInput

Namespace
FluentGpu.Pal.Windows
Assembly
FluentGpu.Pal.Windows.dll

Imm32 IME plumbing for one window: suppresses the system composition window, reads the composition string + caret + clause attributes on WM_IME_COMPOSITION, forwards them to the registered sink, and positions the candidate window at the caret (CFS_EXCLUDE). Reused buffers — the typing edge allocates only event strings.

public sealed class Win32TextInput : IPlatformTextInput
Inheritance
object
Win32TextInput

Win32TextInput(nint) 

public Win32TextInput(nint hwnd)

Parameters

hwnd nint

Properties

CaretBlinkMs

The OS caret blink half-period in ms (Win32 GetCaretBlinkTime; headless = a fixed test value).

public int CaretBlinkMs { get; }

Property Value

int

Methods

OnComposition(long)

WM_IME_COMPOSITION: lParam says which pieces are valid. A single message can both COMMIT the previous composition (GCS_RESULTSTR) and open the next one (GCS_COMPSTR) — deliver in that order, like Imm32 does.

public void OnComposition(long lParam)

Parameters

lParam long

OnEndComposition() 

public void OnEndComposition()

OnStartComposition() 

public void OnStartComposition()

SetCaretRectPx(in RectF)

Position the candidate window: the caret rect in PHYSICAL window pixels (CFS_EXCLUDE placement).

public void SetCaretRectPx(in RectF rect)

Parameters

rect RectF

SetEditable(bool)

Enable/disable the IME for this window (ImmAssociateContext on/off) — flipped when keyboard focus enters/leaves an editable control, so the IME never composes over a button.

public void SetEditable(bool editable)

Parameters

editable bool

SetSink(ITextInputSink?)

Register the composition sink (the focused editor, via the input router). Null = none.

public void SetSink(ITextInputSink? sink)

Parameters

sink ITextInputSink
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
